category_sources: source_facts.description says it scans Kubernetes clusters and diagnoses issues; official docs describe K8sGPT documentation for Kubernetes SRE workflows.
display_name_sources: Official docs title is K8sGPT Documentation; official site and GitHub repository use K8sGPT.
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation domain docs.k8sgpt.ai provides overview, getting started, tutorials, reference, and explanations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/k8sgpt-ai/k8sgpt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions scanning Kubernetes clusters and diagnosing issues in simple English; official GitHub README says it codifies SRE experience and enriches findings with AI; current_curation.tags includes cli.
